title: Heroes of Legends
description: A mod that adds Minecraft Legends to Minecraft
body:
This mod adds ALL content from Minecraft Legends to Minecraft!




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

First, this mod adds all the golems from MCL (Minecraft Legends) to the base game!

![All Golems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c9db0ded9e4e87f6292c7a4a903717a594858e3.png)



Which can be spawned by crafting thier spawn eggs!
![Plank Golem Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ff7b81e7425f466806cc229520b4bbc3a3dc204_0.webp)
![Cobblestone Golem Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed41c4eeee6804a164772119dceacc0c4d173006_0.webp)
![Mossy Golem Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b70923b977bd286846ee29beb49dd35f66ef8590_0.webp)
![Grindstone Golem Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/562165492f924aeb0243b7c58c56655da2219a3d_0.webp)
To tame them you need to craft the Banner Of Courage so they can follow you and fight by your side!
![Banner Of Courage Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dd51e13a7ffc3625f823fca022ce55b8952033a_0.webp)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

As you go on your adventure you should meet one of the Firsts! With each can be found in different biomes and will be lying on the ground destroyed. If you find one of them, left click them to revive them and tame them with your Banner of Courage and they will fight for you!


The First of Oak can be seen in Badlands
![First Of Oak Destroyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225ba6318b0eb504eac4c7818e4ab413a74d591b_0.webp)
The First of Stone can be seen in Meadows
![First Of Stone Destroyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc2463b88011cb106740b67ce6830cec4fe13bb6.jpeg)
The First of Brick can be seen in Windswept Savannas in a big spire
![First Of Brick Destroyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f78478a94bfad5150b879a0597646cc51f9ecc6.jpeg)
The First of Diorite can be seen in Jagged Peaks
![First Of Diorite Destroyed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd6e07fad821da26fb5814a0465fc430860f1c0.jpeg)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

On your adventure you should also see a bunch of blue and yellow allays flying around. The blue ones are Gather Allays and the yellow ones are Build Allays.
![Allays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d61bc3c270884bc64fe949e77eacd58a0ea32736.jpeg)
Gather Allays can be left clicked to give you resources like planks, cobblestone, ect.
While Build Allays can build structures like ramps, walls, ect.
you can also spawn them for whenever you need resources or to build defenses.
![Wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a1b06eb0a25974a918353fc1dfe2163e684a3cf.jpeg)![stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/076f2787f42dc9516edcde48f8abde04cdb7b9e7.jpeg)![iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6a757079b80bb6009d958a597f5077912fb9eca.jpeg)![ramp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2538e1e7f7c1ffe3ef3df8927bbdfe964d23ddd0.jpeg)![wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e420d5a49fd7cfa0a0a4d154b3ee471e2bd0169b.jpeg)![gate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47cf4b5c8b6c50d2d448c989b72197ced20a969f.jpeg)![arrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40eb6f947897835bc2b5cffe4be2f70c6928dc0b.jpeg)![tnt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d75d72385693caf54307f8d252f53dcc9f950641.jpeg)
![ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8514d3418d6d693ac1b45403d828deb3dccdd81a.jpeg)
And if you want them to just follow you around and save them for later, then you can craft a Lute! Right click the allays with your Lute, and they'll follow you wherever you go!
![lute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/141c8e11139c9f212227c52271116c880e967720.jpeg)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You may have already noticed a lot of red netherrack everywhere. Thats where all of The Great Hog's minions crowd with infection, to corrupt the land of the overworld. Bases with portals that bring the piglins and a lot of cages with allies that need help, free them and tame them to help on your journey to get rid of the first horde: The Horde Of The Bastion

![bastion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d57ef9e603e281a7f3cc9f05ff226eeeec0974.jpeg)
When their leader The Unbreakable is defeated, it will drop it's Magma Cannon, wich when left clicked shoots fireballs and right clicked summons magma cubes
![magma](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21140c51e92fd11df719d5b85577b3d00e81c882.jpeg)
But the next horde: The Horde Of The Hunt has a bit more and faster company

![hunt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f519d0f61829786027cbf3e7d179cdf8299dd2d6.jpeg)
When the leader, The Beast is defeated, it'll drop it's Bone Cudgel that can deal massive damage and gives slowness 3 to the targeted enemy when hit.
![bone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59c6066dd6e9d365a6898d3a996402a4d74827ba.jpeg) 
And finally, probably the most ruthless and disgusting horde: The Horde Of The Spore

![spore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2645b83150bdb3d29fed0be76892959dbc1ec837.jpeg)
When The Devourer, the leader of the horde is defeated, it will drop a rather poisonous Spore that can poison the targeted enemy when hit with.
![spore item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e82ec0b22f8da7ce91187fad7f2ee490a103627.jpeg)
And the final boss, the king of all hordes: The Great Hog will be your last obsticle to save the overworld.![hog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0402759d927a4ee11dbf2cfdd37a71740f5272d3.jpeg) When finally defeated, it will drop it's Portal Staff!![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb6b08c4cf3ea277c46f0dd0a8436048f835abad.jpeg) When right clicked it summons a bunch of unwanted piglins, but you can combine all the elements of the golems with the staff and you can make it a Golem Staff!![golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f314a92d16609255e192108e2bbfedff848fd350.jpeg) When right clicked it summons a lot of friendly golems to fight with you, for your story does not end here, for you have more places, creatures and mysteries to discover.
</details>



Extra details: Here is a description of what else this mod adds.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

All mounts:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Regal Tiger can be found in Plains
![tiger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98aa8d3d24d9026f280f596e1a394cfcaefddf10.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Brilliant Beetle can be found in Jungles
![beetle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5009d80d7c66ef543171fb0ff7a56539fc1edeb8.jpeg)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Fearless Frog can be found in Mangrove Swamps
![frog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12c8a79ffb70bb55001ee8ff8ed665d9818e0123.jpeg)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The Big Beak can be found in Jagged Peaks
![beak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c664ac380736dd506ee9dfd77b3f162b4080887.jpeg)
</details>
All piglin weapons



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Mace: Does 7 attack damage, can be crafted
![mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e52e7ede253ee684f621f4f7b2b728954be5aa5e.jpeg)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Flail: Right click to shoot flail, can be crafted
![flail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b9d52c6ba49d107f518441e258a74d3f07dc917.jpeg)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Pigmadillo Armor: Gives you Speed 3 and Strenght 3 when worn, can be crafted
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ad88f0a51d76179c3cf1db6c6e2efcfe7dfe9b.jpeg)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Spore Fungus: Gives poison to the targeted enemy when hit, can be dropped by a Sporeback
![fungus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0edf78664e325888d2e4291bf028d3d8b6ab3a0.jpeg)

</details>
Extra animals:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Badger: can be found in Plains
![badger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dc04c7d6ab529c00e87940adf9f07e9ff60b69f.jpeg)


</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Marmot: can be found at Rivers
![marmot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/502ea9d3fa31d0a6818dc8139f3cc3d61b050374.jpeg)

</details>



</details>



</details>



</details>


</details>

This mod was made using Blockbench and MCreator.
